case_title: JEREMY W. SELL VS. PATRICK M. ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELL, JEREMY W.

ORDER (SC-105A): "THE COURT ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT MUST GO COURT IF HE WANT TO BE HEARD. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AT ANY COURT HEARINGS IN THIS CASE", PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD DATED JANUARY 19, 2010. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE. OF FEB-24-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. MOTION TO QUASH GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MAY RESET AND SERVE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
